summary: All 10 review criteria pass. Phase 4.5 is present and complete with taste-profile writing and experience writing. The taste-profile template includes all 5 required sections (Цветовые предпочтения, Типографика, Стиль и смелость, Антипаттерны, История изменений). All 4 edge cases are explicitly handled: missing taste-profile (create), corrupted (recreate with user warning), missing designer-experience (create), missing category section (create). Latest-wins policy is implemented with 'пересмотрено {YYYY-MM-DD}' marking in История изменений. Append-only constraint for designer-experience.md is explicitly stated and enforced. Two-layer description instruction is embedded in Phase 3 step 3. Phase 5 next-session prompt template includes the Вкусовой профиль section with fallback text. Self-Verification has all 4 new items added. No regression: all original phases (1, 2, 3, 4, 4.5, 5) and their checkpoints are preserved. The reference link to designer-experience.md uses the correct relative path (../../shared/design-references/designer-experience.md) and the file exists. No emphasis words found. SKILL.md is 242 lines, well within the 500-line limit.
